---
title: 'SnapPix: Efficient-Coding–Inspired In-Sensor Compression for Edge Vision'
author:
- Weikai Lin
- Tianrui Ma
- Adith Boloor
- Yu Feng
- Ruofan Xing
- Xuan Zhang
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1109/DAC63849.2025.11132672
talk_source: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Jk58LvVzjw7N9pajXXbuj96i6mIkgLpwlhIzwec6i1Q/edit?usp=sharing
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/SnapPix
journ: DAC
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 95
---
